title: Prototype accelerator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:PrototypeAccelerator-K1.jpg|thumb|right|The prototype accelerator on the garage floor of the [[Black Vulkar Base]].]]

The '''prototype accelerator''' was a device to be used on a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bike]]. Created by [[Hidden Beks]] swoop bike [[Technician/Legends|mechanics]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], this prototype gave a swoop bike faster acceleration and better performance. However, the prototype heated up far quicker than a normal swoop accelerator, impairing its stability and making it more likely to overheat and explode during intensive use.

The prototype accelerator was stolen from the Hidden Beks by the [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]] gang for their own use in the [[Tarisian Season Opener]]. However, it was later recovered from the Vulkars by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], who used the accelerator to [[Rescue of Bastila Shan|win]] [[Bastila Shan]] from the [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] leader [[Brejik]].

Three hundred years later, during the reconstruction of Taris, a businessman named [[Tarkos Sund]] sought to find the prototype accelerator so he could update and repurpose it. Sund hired a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]-aligned individual to find the accelerator, who succeeded in finding it and bringing it to him.

==Behind the scenes==
This article assumes the canonical [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] storyline of ''Knights of the Old Republic''. Alternatively, a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] player can agree to help the Black Vulkar gang by assassinating the leader of the Hidden Beks, [[Gadon Thek]], in return for use of the prototype accelerator in the Tarisian Season Opener.

This article also assumes 100% game completion of ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', including the Republic storyline on Taris, meaning Sund received the accelerator.
